description: This file provides API functions for interacting with a notes backend service, including listing, creating, updating, and deleting notes. It relies on a base URL configuration and uses fetch for HTTP requests.

methods.name: url(path)
methods.description: Builds a full API URL from a path, supporting empty base URL for same-origin setups.

methods.name: request(path, options = {})
methods.description: Performs an HTTP fetch request, handles errors, and parses JSON response.

methods.name: listNotes({ q, tag, limit = 50, offset = 0 })
methods.description: Fetches a list of notes with optional search, tag filter, limit, and offset.

methods.name: createNote({ title, content, tags })
methods.description: Creates a new note with given title, content, and optional tags.

methods.name: updateNote(id, { title, content, tags })
methods.description: Updates an existing note by ID, with optional title, content, and tags.

ctags.name: createNote
ctags.pattern: /^export async function createNote({ title, content, tags }) {$/

ctags.name: listNotes
ctags.pattern: /^export async function listNotes({ q, tag, limit = 50, offset = 0 }) {$/

ctags.name: updateNote
ctags.pattern: /^export async function updateNote(id, { title, content, tags }) {$/
